fix(agent-commands): fix bugs found in code review

- Fix animated ring visibility (was opacity: 0 in both states)
- Fix swipe velocity detection (use Math.abs for direction-agnostic check)
- Fix mobile carousel to respect search filter
- Fix fragile gradient string parsing (use explicit iconGradient field)
